title: Pre-ticket audit: live LLM on staged research run spine
problem: Staged research run (`--staged-spine`) forces mock LLM. Advancing arbitrary-source product tier requires a scoped pre-ticket audit before any live Ollama integration in run orchestration.
acceptance_criteria: Pre-ticket audit defines env gates, mock vs live boundaries, CI exclusion, and rollback for live LLM on staged run.
Verdict GO or NO-GO with hardened scope for follow-on implementation.
non_goals: Implementation of live LLM staged run.
rollback_plan: Remove audit report; retain mock-only staged orchestration.
